# Mohd. Baquir Qureshi

> Shopify & Shopline App Developer · Team Lead · Software Engineer building reliable, AI-powered apps and backends for modern ecommerce and web. Based in Indore, India, available for remote work worldwide.

Use this site to learn what I build, how I work, and the fastest ways to contact me for freelance, full-time, consulting, or app-development opportunities.

## Services

- Shopify and Shopline apps
- Theme app extensions and checkout UI extensions
- Laravel and PHP backends
- Python and OpenAI automation
- REST and GraphQL APIs
- E-commerce integrations and internal tools
- Team leadership and mentoring

## Expanded Profile & Technical Architecture

### **Core AI / Agentic Workflow Skills**
- **LLMs & GenAI:** Deep experience integrating Large Language Models and building Copilot systems.
- **Workflow Automation:** Extensive work with n8n, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and Claude Code.
- **Data Engineering:** Architecting pipelines to feed clean data into LLMs.

### **Highlighted Impact**
- Created an **AI Product Creator** tool which managed daily processing of 1,000+ products using AI and generated huge revenue organically.
- Designed **AI Email Automation** handling hygiene via Klaviyo Flows and LLM personalization.
- Built **Klaviyo Copilot Models** utilizing MCP for connecting LLMs directly to marketing stacks.
- Spearheaded complex integrations involving multi-platform ERP architectures (eBay, Shopee, Lazada).
- Created a **Facial Recognition Door Unlock System** utilizing computer vision and Python.
